name: Handy Task Management website
description: FullStack Task management webse Project by Yasin Arafat Ajad

scripts.ins: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold "cd CLIENT && pnpm install" "cd SERVER && pnpm install"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold "cd CLIENT && pnpm dev" "cd SERVER && pnpm dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n CLIENT -c bgBlue.bold "cd CLIENT && pnpm build"

author: Yasin Arafat Ajad
